item.title: We're testing the structural integrity of this cat. 🗼 He has not moved. He has not blinked. He has only... stared. How many treats could you stack on your pet before they moved? My guess is zero. 😂 #catsoftiktok #stackingchallenge #funnycat #catmemes #sel
item.description: By @jack.wx0: We're testing the structural integrity of this cat. 🗼 He has not moved. He has not blinked. He has only... stared. How many treats could you stack on your pet before they moved? My guess is zero. 😂 #catsoftiktok #stackingchallenge #funnycat #catmemes #sel
